track: Don't Go Breaking My Heart - Remastered
title: Last week, Shelly decided she didn’t want to eat🥺  I spent all mornin...
description: Last week, Shelly decided she didn’t want to eat🥺  I spent all morning cooking a special breakfast trying to get her to eat stressing over every detail… And then Saturday night she’s running around eating everything waking me up at 5 AM the next day begging for more like I didn’t just make her feast yesterday😅 Life of a senior dog…  Especially chihuahuas, I swear they did this on purpose for attention and treats…  #rescuedog #chihuahua #relatable #dogmom
fulltitle: Last week, Shelly decided she didn’t want to eat🥺  I spent all mornin...
